description_long: This bird has a slender, elongated body with predominantly dark gray plumage and a lighter gray underbelly. Its wings are long and narrow, extending outward with visible feather segmentation, and the tail is also elongated with pointed feathers. The head features a prominent crest of spiky feathers, giving it a distinctive silhouette, and the beak is long, straight, and orange, contrasting with the rest of the body. The legs are thin and long, ending in yellow feet with visible claws. The eyes are round and white, standing out against the darker head feathers. Overall, the bird has a dynamic, alert posture, suggesting readiness for flight or movement.
description: A slender, dark gray bird with a spiky head crest, long orange beak, and elongated wings and tail. Its yellow legs and feet add a striking contrast.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bird's outstretched wings, spiky head crest, and straight orange beak.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlights the bird's long neck, crest, and the curvature of its wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the pointed tail feathers and the symmetry of the wings and legs.
description_view_3: Oblique rear-side view emphasizes the layered tail feathers and the profile of the head and beak.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid gray with subtle gradients and a spiky crest
